---
title: "Therapy Resistant PDX Analysis (3 reps)"
author: "Karmanpreet Sukhija"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

Using the BulkRNAnalyses package, HTSeq- & featurecounts-generated reads will be read in & used for DESeq2 differential expression analysis & GSEA using HALLMARK, KEGG & GO gene sets. Following from this, pathways of interest will be visualised with heatmaps of log values of gene expression. 

#Enzalutamide-treated PDXs (167.2M Cx, 201.1A Cx)

```{r mono-enza}
library(bulkanalyses)

#Read in HTSeq-generated counts 
#all_data <- read_htseq_data("/Users/karmansukhija/Desktop/work (*ᴗ͈ˬᴗ͈)ꕤ*.ﾟ/PhD/2026/MURAL PDX Counts/HTSEQ_OUTPUT_POLYA")
all_data <- read_featurecounts_data("/Users/karmansukhija/Desktop/work (*ᴗ͈ˬᴗ͈)ꕤ*.ﾟ/PhD/2026/MURAL PDX Counts/pdx_featurecounts_Q10.txt")

#Read in annotation file & match annotations
all_metadata <- match_annotations(all_data,
                                        metadata_path = "/Users/karmansukhija/Desktop/work (*ᴗ͈ˬᴗ͈)ꕤ*.ﾟ/PhD/2026/MURAL PDX Counts/DOD Project_RNAExtraction_David Goode_181022.csv",
                                        match_col = "Tube.label",
                                        clean_col = "Sample_Name")
#Take out variables from list
final_data <- all_metadata$counts_final
final_metadata <- all_metadata$metadata_final

#Subset PDX lines treated with Enzalutamide monotherapy
enza_mono_data <- subset_of_interest(sample_list = c("Enza_201.1A-Cx-1", "Enza_201.1A-Cx-2", "Enza_201.1A-Cx-3", 
                                                     "Vehicle_201.1A-Cx-1", "Vehicle_201.1A-Cx-2", "Vehicle_201.1A-Cx-3",
                                                     "Enza_167.2M-Cx-1", "Enza_167.2M-Cx-2", "Enza_167.2M-Cx-3", 
                                                     "Vehicle_167.2M-Cx-1", "Vehicle_167.2M-Cx-2", "Vehicle_167.2M-Cx-3"),
                                     count_data = final_data,
                                     metadata = final_metadata,
                                     matching_sample_names = "Sample_Name")

enza_data <- enza_mono_data$matched_data_of_interest
enza_metadata <- enza_mono_data$matched_labels_of_interest

#Run DESeq2 pipeline 
enza_res <- run_deseq2(count_data = enza_data,
                       metadata = enza_metadata,
                       design_formula = ~ PDX_LINE + Treatment,
                       reference_factor = "Treatment",
                       reference_level = "Talazoparib + Carboplatin vehicle",
                       contrast_vector = c("Treatment", "Enzalutamide", "Talazoparib + Carboplatin vehicle"))

#Extract DESeq2 results
enza_dds <- enza_res$dds_object
enza_res_table <- enza_res$results_table

#Print DESeq2 results
print_results(enza_res_table, file_name = "enza_PDXs_DEGs.csv")

#Generate volcano plot from DESeq2 results 
generate_volcano(enza_res_table)

#Generate PCA plot from DESeq2 results using rlog transformation as (n < 30)
generate_pca(enza_dds, transformation = "rlog", color_by = "Treatment", shape_by = "PDX_LINE")

#Run GSEA using HALLMARK gene sets & generate dotplot
enza_hallmark_res <- run_gsea(enza_res_table, database = "HALLMARK", stat = "stat", seed = 1234)

library(enrichplot)
library(ggplot2)

dotplot(enza_hallmark_res, showCategory = 10, split = ".sign") + 
    facet_grid(.~.sign) +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(title = "Top 10 HALLMARK Pathway Enrichment for 201.1A Cx & 167.2M Cx Enzalutamide vs Vehicle Control") +
    theme(
      # 1. Main Plot Title
      plot.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", hjust = 1), 
      
      # 2. Axis Titles (e.g., "GeneRatio" on the X-axis)
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
      
      # 3. Axis Text (The pathway names on the Y, the numbers on the X)
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"), 
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
      
      # 4. Facet Labels (The "activated" and "suppressed" grey boxes at the top)
      strip.text = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
      
      # 5. Legend Text (The size/color scales on the right)
      legend.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 20)
    )

#Run GSEA using GO gene sets & generate dotplot
enza_go_res <- run_gsea(enza_res_table, database = "GO", stat = "stat", seed = 1234)

dotplot(enza_go_res, showCategory = 10, split = ".sign") + 
    facet_grid(.~.sign) +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(title = "Top 10 GO Pathway Enrichment for 201.1A Cx & 167.2M Cx Enzalutamide vs Vehicle Control") +
    theme(
      # 1. Main Plot Title
      plot.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold", hjust = 1), 
      
      # 2. Axis Titles (e.g., "GeneRatio" on the X-axis)
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
      
      # 3. Axis Text (The pathway names on the Y, the numbers on the X)
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"), 
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
      
      # 4. Facet Labels (The "activated" and "suppressed" grey boxes at the top)
      strip.text = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
      
      # 5. Legend Text (The size/color scales on the right)
      legend.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 10)
    )

#Run GSEA using KEGG gene sets & generate dotplot
enza_kegg_res <- run_gsea(enza_res_table, database = "KEGG", stat = "stat", seed = 1234)

dotplot(enza_kegg_res, showCategory = 10, split = ".sign") + 
    facet_grid(.~.sign) +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(title = "Top 10 KEGG Pathway Enrichment for 201.1A Cx & 167.2M Cx Enzalutamide vs Vehicle Control") +
    theme(
      # 1. Main Plot Title
      plot.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold", hjust = 1), 
      
      # 2. Axis Titles (e.g., "GeneRatio" on the X-axis)
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
      
      # 3. Axis Text (The pathway names on the Y, the numbers on the X)
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"), 
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
      
      # 4. Facet Labels (The "activated" and "suppressed" grey boxes at the top)
      strip.text = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
      
      # 5. Legend Text (The size/color scales on the right)
      legend.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 10)
    )

#Generate heatmaps of pathways of interest
print(enza_hallmark_res$Description)

generate_heatmap_of_interest(enza_hallmark_res, enza_dds, transformation = "rlog", annotations = c("Treatment", "PDX_LINE", "Harvest_Interval"),
                             pathway_of_interest = "INTERFERON_ALPHA_RESPONSE", filename = "enza_heatmap.png")

```

#Talazoparib-treated PDXs (167.2M Cx, 201.1A Cx, 201.2A Cx, 305R Cx, 426M Cx)

```{r mono-tala}
#Subset PDX lines treated with Talazoparib monotherapy
tala_mono_data <- subset_of_interest(sample_list = c("Tala_201.1A-Cx-1", "Tala_201.1A-Cx-2", "Tala_201.1A-Cx-3", 
                                                     "Vehicle_201.1A-Cx-1", "Vehicle_201.1A-Cx-2", "Vehicle_201.1A-Cx-3", 
                                                     "Tala_167.2M-Cx-1", "Tala_167.2M-Cx-2", "Tala_167.2M-Cx-3", 
                                                     "Vehicle_167.2M-Cx-1", "Vehicle_167.2M-Cx-2", "Vehicle_167.2M-Cx-3", 
                                                     "Tala_201.2A-Cx-1", "Tala_201.2A-Cx-2", "Tala_201.2A-Cx-3",
                                                     "Vehicle_201.2A-Cx-1", "Vehicle_201.2A-Cx-2", "Vehicle_201.2A-Cx-3", 
                                                     "Tala_305R-Cx-1", "Tala_305R-Cx-2", "Tala_305R-Cx-3", 
                                                     "Vehicle_305R-Cx-1", "Vehicle_305R-Cx-2", "Vehicle_305R-Cx-3",
                                                     "Tala_426M-Cx-1", "Tala_426M-Cx-2", "Tala_426M-Cx-3", 
                                                     "Vehicle_426M-Cx-1", "Vehicle_426M-Cx-2", "Vehicle_426M-Cx-3"),
                                     count_data = final_data,
                                     metadata = final_metadata,
                                     matching_sample_names = "Sample_Name")

tala_data <- tala_mono_data$matched_data_of_interest
tala_metadata <- tala_mono_data$matched_labels_of_interest

#Run DESeq2 pipeline 
tala_res <- run_deseq2(count_data = tala_data,
                       metadata = tala_metadata,
                       design_formula = ~ PDX_LINE + Treatment,
                       reference_factor = "Treatment",
                       reference_level = "Talazoparib + Carboplatin vehicle",
                       contrast_vector = c("Treatment", "Talazoparib", "Talazoparib + Carboplatin vehicle"))

#Extract DESeq2 results
tala_dds <- tala_res$dds_object
tala_res_table <- tala_res$results_table

#Print DESeq2 results
print_results(tala_res_table, file_name = "tala_PDXs_DEGs.csv")

#Generate volcano plot from DESeq2 results 
generate_volcano(tala_res_table)

#Generate PCA plot from DESeq2 results using rlog transformation as (n < 30)
generate_pca(tala_dds, transformation = "rlog", color_by = "Treatment", shape_by = "PDX_LINE")

#Run GSEA using HALLMARK gene sets & generate dotplot
tala_hallmark_res <- run_gsea(tala_res_table, database = "HALLMARK", stat = "stat", seed = 1234)

library(enrichplot)
library(ggplot2)

dotplot(tala_hallmark_res, showCategory = 10, split = ".sign") + 
    facet_grid(.~.sign) +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(title = "Top 10 HALLMARK Pathway Enrichment for 5 PDX lines Talazoparib vs Vehicle Control") +
    theme(
      # 1. Main Plot Title
      plot.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", hjust = 1), 
      
      # 2. Axis Titles (e.g., "GeneRatio" on the X-axis)
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
      
      # 3. Axis Text (The pathway names on the Y, the numbers on the X)
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"), 
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
      
      # 4. Facet Labels (The "activated" and "suppressed" grey boxes at the top)
      strip.text = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
      
      # 5. Legend Text (The size/color scales on the right)
      legend.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 20)
    )

#Run GSEA using GO gene sets & generate dotplot
tala_go_res <- run_gsea(tala_res_table, database = "GO", stat = "stat", seed = 1234)

dotplot(tala_go_res, showCategory = 10, split = ".sign") + 
    facet_grid(.~.sign) +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(title = "Top 10 GO Pathway Enrichment for 5 PDX Lines Talazoparib vs Vehicle Control") +
    theme(
      # 1. Main Plot Title
      plot.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold", hjust = 1), 
      
      # 2. Axis Titles (e.g., "GeneRatio" on the X-axis)
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
      
      # 3. Axis Text (The pathway names on the Y, the numbers on the X)
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"), 
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
      
      # 4. Facet Labels (The "activated" and "suppressed" grey boxes at the top)
      strip.text = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
      
      # 5. Legend Text (The size/color scales on the right)
      legend.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 10)
    )

#Run GSEA using KEGG gene sets & generate dotplot
tala_kegg_res <- run_gsea(tala_res_table, database = "KEGG", stat = "stat", seed = 1234)

dotplot(tala_kegg_res, showCategory = 10, split = ".sign") + 
    facet_grid(.~.sign) +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(title = "Top 10 KEGG Pathway Enrichment for 5 PDX lines Talazoparib vs Vehicle Control") +
    theme(
      # 1. Main Plot Title
      plot.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold", hjust = 1), 
      
      # 2. Axis Titles (e.g., "GeneRatio" on the X-axis)
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
      
      # 3. Axis Text (The pathway names on the Y, the numbers on the X)
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"), 
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
      
      # 4. Facet Labels (The "activated" and "suppressed" grey boxes at the top)
      strip.text = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
      
      # 5. Legend Text (The size/color scales on the right)
      legend.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 10)
    )

#Generate heatmaps of pathways of interest
print(tala_hallmark_res$Description)

generate_heatmap_of_interest(tala_hallmark_res, tala_dds, transformation = "rlog", annotations = c("Treatment", "PDX_LINE", "Harvest_Interval"),
                             pathway_of_interest = "DNA_REPAIR", filename = "tala_heatmap.png")

```

#Carboplatin-treated PDXs (167.2M Cx, 201.1A Cx, 201.2A Cx, 305R Cx, 426M Cx)

```{r mono-carbo}

#Subset PDX lines treated with Carboplatin monotherapy
carbo_mono_data <- subset_of_interest(sample_list = c("Carbo_201.1A-Cx-1", "Carbo_201.1A-Cx-2", "Carbo_201.1A-Cx-3", 
                                                     "Vehicle_201.1A-Cx-1", "Vehicle_201.1A-Cx-2", "Vehicle_201.1A-Cx-3", 
                                                     "Carbo_167.2M-Cx-1", "Carbo_167.2M-Cx-2", "Carbo_167.2M-Cx-3", 
                                                     "Vehicle_167.2M-Cx-1", "Vehicle_167.2M-Cx-2", "Vehicle_167.2M-Cx-3", 
                                                     "Carbo_201.2A-Cx-1", "Carbo_201.2A-Cx-2", "Carbo_201.2A-Cx-3",
                                                     "Vehicle_201.2A-Cx-1", "Vehicle_201.2A-Cx-2", "Vehicle_201.2A-Cx-3", 
                                                     "Carbo_305R-Cx-1", "Carbo_305R-Cx-2", "Carbo_305R-Cx-3", 
                                                     "Vehicle_305R-Cx-1", "Vehicle_305R-Cx-2", "Vehicle_305R-Cx-3",
                                                     "Carbo_426M-Cx-1", "Carbo_426M-Cx-2", "Carbo_426M-Cx-3", 
                                                     "Vehicle_426M-Cx-1", "Vehicle_426M-Cx-2", "Vehicle_426M-Cx-3"),
                                     count_data = final_data,
                                     metadata = final_metadata,
                                     matching_sample_names = "Sample_Name")

carbo_data <- carbo_mono_data$matched_data_of_interest
carbo_metadata <- carbo_mono_data$matched_labels_of_interest

#Run DESeq2 pipeline 
carbo_res <- run_deseq2(count_data = carbo_data,
                       metadata = carbo_metadata,
                       design_formula = ~ PDX_LINE + Treatment,
                       reference_factor = "Treatment",
                       reference_level = "Talazoparib + Carboplatin vehicle",
                       contrast_vector = c("Treatment", "Carboplatin", "Talazoparib + Carboplatin vehicle"))

#Extract DESeq2 results
carbo_dds <- carbo_res$dds_object
carbo_res_table <- carbo_res$results_table

#Print DESeq2 results
print_results(carbo_res_table, file_name = "carbo_PDXs_DEGs.csv")

#Generate volcano plot from DESeq2 results 
generate_volcano(carbo_res_table)

#Generate PCA plot from DESeq2 results using rlog transformation as (n < 30)
generate_pca(carbo_dds, transformation = "rlog", color_by = "Treatment", shape_by = "PDX_LINE")

#Run GSEA using HALLMARK gene sets & generate dotplot
carbo_hallmark_res <- run_gsea(carbo_res_table, database = "HALLMARK", stat = "stat", seed = 1234)

library(enrichplot)
library(ggplot2)

dotplot(carbo_hallmark_res, showCategory = 10, split = ".sign") + 
    facet_grid(.~.sign) +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(title = "Top 10 HALLMARK Pathway Enrichment for 5 PDX lines Carboplatin vs Vehicle Control") +
    theme(
      # 1. Main Plot Title
      plot.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", hjust = 1), 
      
      # 2. Axis Titles (e.g., "GeneRatio" on the X-axis)
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
      
      # 3. Axis Text (The pathway names on the Y, the numbers on the X)
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"), 
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
      
      # 4. Facet Labels (The "activated" and "suppressed" grey boxes at the top)
      strip.text = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
      
      # 5. Legend Text (The size/color scales on the right)
      legend.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 20)
    )

#Run GSEA using GO gene sets & generate dotplot
carbo_go_res <- run_gsea(carbo_res_table, database = "GO", stat = "stat", seed = 1234)

dotplot(carbo_go_res, showCategory = 10, split = ".sign") + 
    facet_grid(.~.sign) +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(title = "Top 10 GO Pathway Enrichment for 5 PDX Lines Carboplatin vs Vehicle Control") +
    theme(
      # 1. Main Plot Title
      plot.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold", hjust = 1), 
      
      # 2. Axis Titles (e.g., "GeneRatio" on the X-axis)
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
      
      # 3. Axis Text (The pathway names on the Y, the numbers on the X)
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"), 
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
      
      # 4. Facet Labels (The "activated" and "suppressed" grey boxes at the top)
      strip.text = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
      
      # 5. Legend Text (The size/color scales on the right)
      legend.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 10)
    )

#Run GSEA using KEGG gene sets & generate dotplot
carbo_kegg_res <- run_gsea(carbo_res_table, database = "KEGG", stat = "stat", seed = 1234)

dotplot(carbo_kegg_res, showCategory = 10, split = ".sign") + 
    facet_grid(.~.sign) +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(title = "Top 10 KEGG Pathway Enrichment for 5 PDX lines Carboplatin vs Vehicle Control") +
    theme(
      # 1. Main Plot Title
      plot.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold", hjust = 1), 
      
      # 2. Axis Titles (e.g., "GeneRatio" on the X-axis)
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
      
      # 3. Axis Text (The pathway names on the Y, the numbers on the X)
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"), 
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
      
      # 4. Facet Labels (The "activated" and "suppressed" grey boxes at the top)
      strip.text = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
      
      # 5. Legend Text (The size/color scales on the right)
      legend.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 10)
    )

#Generate heatmaps of pathways of interest
print(carbo_hallmark_res$Description)

generate_heatmap_of_interest(carbo_hallmark_res, tala_dds, transformation = "rlog", annotations = c("Treatment", "PDX_LINE", "Harvest_Interval"),
                             pathway_of_interest = "HYPOXIA", filename = "carbo_heatmap.png")

```
